title: Sigma Visuals
description: The best visuals even existed for minecraft
body:
Sigma Visuals is a PvP-focused utility mod built for clean combat and smooth visuals. It includes low fire, polished
  ESP tracking, Pro HUD widgets, smart combat helpers, and ready presets for different playstyles. Every feature is
  tuned for stable FPS, clear target readability, and responsive control, so fights feel smoother, cleaner, and more
  consistent on any server.
